name: claude-code-companion
description: The Companion overlay plugin: agent-authored tiered artifacts, deterministic rendering, Sonnet/Opus visual escalation, bespoke HTML tools, and health checks.

plugins.name: companion
plugins.description: Observe Claude sessions asynchronously: the agent authors artifact content, a deterministic renderer builds routine cards with no model call, and intense turns escalate to a Sonnet/Opus designer.
